data.name: lbHexView.Text
data.value: You can Display the HexView for all Files by choosing Extra->Use HexView from the main Menu.

data.name: ofd.Filter
data.value: Sims 2 Package (*.package)|*.package|Package Description (*package.xml)|*package.xml|Extracted File (*.simpe)|*.simpe|Extracted File Description (*.simpe.xml)|*.simpe.xml|All Files (*.*)|*.*
